setTrackPosition.description: setTrackPosition(true) sets trackPosition to true and returns same parser instance
setTrackPosition.expectedResult: returned Parser instance is the same as caller; isTrackPosition() returns true

setTrackPosition.description: setTrackPosition(false) sets trackPosition to false and returns same parser instance
setTrackPosition.precondition: initial trackPosition may be true or false
setTrackPosition.expectedResult: returned Parser instance is the same as caller; isTrackPosition() returns false
